introSection: Ali Baba is a steel roller coaster located at Glorious Fantasyland in Dapitan City, Zamboanga del Norte, Philippines.

sections.title: History
sections.content: This roller coaster was manufactured in 1984. It travelled with Butler Amusements in California, United States and was called Backdraft. It closed sometime in or after 2006, and reopened in its current location in 2009.

sections.title: External links
sections.content: * Flickr album with photos of this roller coaster in California

fullText:
Ali Baba is a steel roller coaster located at Glorious Fantasyland in Dapitan City, Zamboanga del Norte, Philippines.

This roller coaster was manufactured in 1984. It travelled with Butler Amusements in California, United States and was called Backdraft. It closed sometime in or after 2006, and reopened in its current location in 2009.






 * Flickr album with photos of this roller coaster in California
